exile.example: The leader lived in exile abroad.
The king was exiled to a small island.
exile.example_zh: 國王被流放到一座小島。

exotic.example: They tried exotic fruits on the trip.
exotic.example_zh: 他們在旅途中嘗了異國水果。

expedition.example: The team went on an expedition to the pole.

expertise.example: We need her expertise to fix the problem.
expertise.example_zh: 我們需要她的專業來解決問題。

exploit.example: We should not exploit natural resources.
exploit.example_zh: 我們不該過度開發自然資源。

extension.example: She asked for an extension on the report.
They built an extension to the house.
extension.example_zh: 他們替房子加蓋了一部分。

extensive.example: He has extensive knowledge of history.

exterior.example: The exterior of the house is painted blue.
exterior.example_zh: 這房子的外觀漆成藍色。

extinct.example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for ages.

fabric.example: This soft fabric is good for summer.
fabric.example_zh: 這種柔軟的布料適合夏天。

fabulous.example: We had a fabulous time at the beach.

facilitate.example: A clear plan can facilitate teamwork.
facilitate.example_zh: 清楚的計畫能促進團隊合作。

faculty.example: The school faculty welcomed the new students.
She has a faculty for languages.

fascinate.example: The story fascinated the whole class.

fatigue.example: After the long hike, he felt great fatigue.
fatigue.example_zh: 長途健行後他覺得非常疲累。

federal.example: The federal government passed the law.
federal.example_zh: 聯邦政府通過了這項法律。

filter.example_zh: 這個程式過濾掉垃圾訊息。

fiscal.example: The company reported its fiscal results.

fleet.example: A fleet of ships sailed into the harbor.

flexibility.example_zh: 瑜伽能增進你的柔軟度。

flip.example: She flipped the pancake in the pan.

fluency.example_zh: 朗讀能增進你的流利度。

fluid.example: Drink plenty of fluids when you are sick.
Her movements were smooth and fluid.

format.example: Save the file in a different format.
format.example_zh: 用不同的格式儲存檔案。
她把文件編排得很整齊。

forum.example: She posted a question on an online forum.
forum.example_zh: 她在線上論壇貼了一個問題。

foster.example: Good teachers foster a love of learning.
foster.example_zh: 好老師能培養對學習的熱愛。

foster.example: They are a kind foster family.
foster.example_zh: 他們是個善良的寄養家庭。

foul.example: The referee called a foul on the player.
A foul smell came from the bin.

fraction.example: Only a fraction of the work is left.
We learned fractions in math class.
fraction.example_zh: 我們在數學課學了分數。

fragment.example: She found a fragment of the broken cup.
fragment.example_zh: 她找到了破杯子的一塊碎片。

framework.example: The plan gives us a clear framework.
framework.example_zh: 這個計畫給了我們清楚的架構。

franchise.example: He opened a franchise of a coffee shop.
franchise.example_zh: 他開了一家咖啡店加盟店。

fraud.example: The man was arrested for fraud.

freight.example: The train carried freight across the country.
freight.example_zh: 火車載著貨物橫越全國。

frontier.example: They traveled to the wild frontier.
She works at the frontier of science.
frontier.example_zh: 她在科學的尖端領域工作。

galaxy.example: Our sun is one star in the galaxy.
galaxy.example_zh: 太陽是銀河系中的一顆恆星。

gasp.example: She gasped when she heard the news.
gasp.example_zh: 聽到消息她倒抽一口氣。

gasp.example: He gave a gasp of surprise.

gathering.example: There was a family gathering at the park.
gathering.example_zh: 公園裡有一場家庭聚會。

generator.example: The generator kept the lights on.

genetic.example: Eye color is a genetic trait.

genre.example: Mystery is her favorite genre of book.
genre.example_zh: 推理是她最愛的書籍類型。

glare.example: The glare from the sun hurt my eyes.
glare.example_zh: 刺眼的陽光讓我眼睛不舒服。

gloomy.example: The sky was gray and gloomy.

gorgeous.example: The sunset over the sea was gorgeous.

grant.example: The school granted her a scholarship.
grant.example_zh: 學校頒給她一筆獎學金。

grant.example: They received a grant for research.
grant.example_zh: 他們獲得一筆研究補助金。

graphic.example_zh: 這份報告有清楚的圖表。

gravity.example: Gravity pulls objects toward the ground.

greed.example: His greed led to his downfall.
greed.example_zh: 他的貪婪導致了他的垮台。

grieve.example: The family grieved for their lost pet.
grieve.example_zh: 這家人為失去的寵物哀傷。

grill.example: He cleaned the grill after the barbecue.

grim.example: The future looked grim after the storm.
grim.example_zh: 暴風雨後前景看來嚴峻。

grip.example: He kept a tight grip on the rope.
She lost her grip and fell.

gross.example: The company's gross income rose this year.
gross.example_zh: 公司今年的總收入增加了。
